discovery.run_summary: Mixed tape with risk-on undertones: VIX -3%, KRE +1.67% on regional bank strength, but consumer staples and discretionary weak. Key catalyst: Intellia's Phase 3 CRISPR success is driving a sympathy rally across gene-editing peers (BEAM, CRSP). Oil at $108 on Iran tension is a key macro backdrop not yet showing in XLE.

notable_index_moves: VIX -3% to 18.14 — risk appetite improving despite Iran/Hormuz headlines
KRE +1.67% — regional banks notably strong, possibly on rate cut speculation despite Dalio's stagflation warning
XLP -1.08% and XLY -0.71% — consumer weakness confirmed by Domino's commentary about industry-wide softness
XLE -0.14% surprising given Brent at $108; suggests market skeptical oil spike is durable
NVDA +4% leading, GOOGL +1.72% on OpenAI/Microsoft deal restructure

discoveries.name: Beam Therapeutics Inc.
discoveries.mechanism: Sympathy buying within gene-editing peer group following Intellia's positive Phase 3 readout in HAE — validates in vivo CRISPR delivery platform that BEAM also pursues (base editing). De-risks the broader gene-editing thesis.
discoveries.catalyst: Intellia Therapeutics Phase 3 trial success in hereditary angioedema announced today
research_pointers: Compare BEAM's pipeline timing vs. Intellia's NTLA-2002 — what is BEAM's nearest catalyst?
Check whether Intellia's success implies validation of LNP delivery (which BEAM also uses) or is technology-specific
Review BEAM cash runway and recent -6.49% 5-day weakness — was there a stock-specific overhang now reversing?
Volume only 1.42x average suggests this is positioning rather than capitulation buying — could extend
discoveries.what_would_falsify: If Intellia's mechanism is sufficiently differentiated from base editing that BEAM peers shouldn't benefit, or if BEAM has near-term clinical/cash overhangs that reassert

discoveries.name: CRISPR Therapeutics AG
discoveries.mechanism: Direct sympathy beneficiary of Intellia Phase 3 success — both companies pursue CRISPR-Cas9 editing. Validates the platform commercially beyond Casgevy/sickle cell. Note 5-day was -11.61%, so a portion of this is also rebound from prior weakness.
research_pointers: Assess whether Intellia's success increases probability of CRSP's own pipeline reads (CTX-310, CTX-320)
Casgevy commercialization run-rate — has uptake improved? CRSP has been weak partly on slow launch
Volume 1.67x is meaningful but not extreme; check if institutional flows extend tomorrow
discoveries.what_would_falsify: Casgevy launch continuing to disappoint would cap upside regardless of platform validation; or if Intellia's specific delivery tech is seen as superior to CRSP's approach

catalyst_chains.primary_event: Intellia Therapeutics Phase 3 success in hereditary angioedema — first major in vivo CRISPR Phase 3 win

secondary_opportunities.relationship: sympathy / in vivo gene editing peer (not in movers list — worth checking)

catalyst_chains.primary_event: Brent crude $108 on Iran/Hormuz tension, but XLE flat — possible underreaction or skepticism about durability

secondary_opportunities.relationship: sympathy / energy commodity (coking coal benefits from energy spikes indirectly)

catalyst_chains.primary_event: Domino's CEO warns of broad fast-food/consumer weakness from winter weather and weak sentiment

secondary_opportunities.relationship: sympathy / restaurant peer at risk of guide-down

discovery.no_signals_note: Mover list is unusually thin (only 3 names). Most actionable signal is the gene-editing sympathy chain off Intellia. AMR's +4.21% on below-average volume (0.6x) is unconvincing — likely noise or thin-trade drift, not flagging as a discovery. Worth Michael also independently checking NTLA itself and other gene-editing names (VERV, EDIT, PRME) not in the candidate list.

ai_announcements.headline: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B AWS deal
ai_announcements.summary: OpenAI gains right to sell on AWS; Microsoft gets revenue share concessions.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: AWS gains a major AI workload customer, narrowing perceived AI infrastructure gap vs Azure/GCP
research_pointers: OpenAI workload sizing on AWS vs Azure

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Revenue-share economics may offset loss of exclusivity; legal overhang removed
research_pointers: Terms of new Microsoft-OpenAI revenue share

ai_announcements.headline: OpenAI could be making a phone with AI agents replacing apps
ai_announcements.summary: Analyst speculates 2028 mass production for an OpenAI phone where agents replace apps.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: iOS ecosystem lock-in is severe; 2028 timeline gives Apple ample response window; Apple's own AI integration progresses
research_pointers: Skye AI home screen app reception

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: Today's flagged movers (BEAM, CRSP, AMR) have no plausible connection to today's AI announcements. BEAM/CRSP move appears to be biotech-specific (gene editing news flow); AMR is coal/metallurgical, unrelated. No AI-driven mispricing signal in the provided market data.
